text.title: Competitive Intelligence Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Weekly digest for an AI-SaaS company
example.note: Watchlist holds 5 competitors. Monday 06:00 UTC the Haiku collector polls 24 URLs and emits 11 events. Classifier tags 3 pricing, 2 funding, 4 feature, 1 hire, 1 review. Synthesizer clusters by competitor; Competitor C announced a Series B (evt-008) plus pricing change (evt-002) - both cited. Threat analyst (Opus) raises C from 2 to 3 because funding evt-008 is corroborated by hiring evt-007 and pricing evt-002 (meets the 3-evidence floor). Battlecard writer regenerates C's battlecard, stamps generated_at + ttl=14d. Fact-checker HEADs all 3 URLs (200); digest + battlecard publish to Slack.
